context: Tests whether the agent corrects common RelevanceKit permission and availability mistakes using source-grounded details.

checklist.name: Location target setup
checklist.description: Places location purpose strings and the location authorization request in the containing app while adding `NSWidgetWantsLocation` to the widget extension.

checklist.name: Widget location check
checklist.description: Checks `CLLocationManager.isAuthorizedForWidgetUpdates` before relying on widget location clues.

checklist.name: Optional POI context
checklist.description: Handles the optional result from `RelevantContext.location(category:)` instead of force-unwrapping it.

checklist.name: Activity rings HealthKit types
checklist.description: Maps `.fitness(.activityRingsIncomplete)` to `appleExerciseTime`, `appleMoveTime`, and `appleStandTime` HealthKit read types.

checklist.name: Active workout HealthKit type
checklist.description: Mentions `HKWorkoutType` as the HealthKit type needed for `.fitness(.workoutActive)` when active-workout relevance is used.

checklist.name: watchOS effect boundary
checklist.description: States that RelevanceKit clues only affect Smart Stack behavior on watchOS even though some APIs compile on other platforms.
